mapper.insert: INSERT INTO delivery_notice_entry ( delivery_notice_id, delivery_notice_no, FMaterialID, FMaterialName, FMateriaModel, FMateriaType, FUnitID, FQty, FStockID, FNoteEntry, FBaseUnitID, FBaseUnitQty, FDeliveryLoc, FDeliveryLAddress, FOrderNo, FOrderSeq, FCustMatID, FLot, FIsFree, FCustMatName, FRemainOutQty, FStockStatusId, FPriceUnitQty, FPrice, FTaxPrice, FTaxCombination, FEntryTaxRate, FPriceCoefficient, FSysPrice, FLimitDownPrice, FBefDisAmt, FBefDisAllAmt, FDiscountRate, F_ora_Decimal, F_ora_Decimal1, F_c, F_k, F_g, F_tj, F_mz, F_jz, F_mzz, F_xs, F_zxs, F_cgzj, F_zjzj, F_kpdj, F_kpzj, F_zwbgpm, F_ywbgpm, F_jzz, F_jcsj, F_khhh, F_sfbg, F_ddhsdj, F_tsl, F_bgdw, F_tcblNEW, F_BCFYNEW, F_GLBCFY, F_ffyq, Fddshrq, Fxsddh, Fxsddhh, Fbzgctg, Fypd, Fykc, F_cty_BaseProperty, Frkshrq, Fckshrq, F_BZFS ) VALUES ( #{deliveryNoticeId}, #{deliveryNoticeNo}, #{FMaterialID}, #{FMaterialName}, #{FMateriaModel}, #{FMateriaType}, #{FUnitID}, #{FQty}, #{FStockID}, #{FNoteEntry}, #{FBaseUnitID}, #{FBaseUnitQty}, #{FDeliveryLoc}, #{FDeliveryLAddress}, #{FOrderNo}, #{FOrderSeq}, #{FCustMatID}, #{FLot}, #{FIsFree}, #{FCustMatName}, #{FRemainOutQty}, #{FStockStatusId}, #{FPriceUnitQty}, #{FPrice}, #{FTaxPrice}, #{FTaxCombination}, #{FEntryTaxRate}, #{FPriceCoefficient}, #{FSysPrice}, #{FLimitDownPrice}, #{FBefDisAmt}, #{FBefDisAllAmt}, #{FDiscountRate}, #{F_ora_Decimal}, #{F_ora_Decimal1}, #{F_c}, #{F_k}, #{F_g}, #{F_tj}, #{F_mz}, #{F_jz}, #{F_mzz}, #{F_xs}, #{F_zxs}, #{F_cgzj}, #{F_zjzj}, #{F_kpdj}, #{F_kpzj}, #{F_zwbgpm}, #{F_ywbgpm}, #{F_jzz}, #{F_jcsj}, #{F_khhh}, #{F_sfbg}, #{F_ddhsdj}, #{F_tsl}, #{F_bgdw}, #{F_tcblNEW}, #{F_BCFYNEW}, #{F_GLBCFY}, #{F_ffyq}, #{Fddshrq}, #{Fxsddh}, #{Fxsddhh}, #{Fbzgctg}, #{Fypd}, #{Fykc}, #{F_cty_BaseProperty}, #{Frkshrq}, #{Fckshrq}, #{F_BZFS}

INSERT INTO delivery_notice_entry ( delivery_notice_id, delivery_notice_no, FMaterialID, FMaterialName, FMateriaModel, FMateriaType, FUnitID, FQty, FStockID, FNoteEntry, FBaseUnitID, FBaseUnitQty, FDeliveryLoc, FDeliveryLAddress, FOrderNo, FOrderSeq, FCustMatID, FLot, FIsFree, FCustMatName, FRemainOutQty, FStockStatusId, FPriceUnitQty, FPrice, FTaxPrice, FTaxCombination, FEntryTaxRate, FPriceCoefficient, FSysPrice, FLimitDownPrice, FBefDisAmt, FBefDisAllAmt, FDiscountRate, F_ora_Decimal, F_ora_Decimal1, F_c, F_k, F_g, F_tj, F_mz, F_jz, F_mzz, F_xs, F_zxs, F_cgzj, F_zjzj, F_kpdj, F_kpzj, F_zwbgpm, F_ywbgpm, F_jzz, F_jcsj, F_khhh, F_sfbg, F_ddhsdj, F_tsl, F_bgdw, F_tcblNEW, F_BCFYNEW, F_GLBCFY, F_ffyq, Fddshrq, Fxsddh, Fxsddhh, Fbzgctg, Fypd, Fykc, F_cty_BaseProperty, Frkshrq, Fckshrq, F_BZFS ) VALUES
( #{entry.deliveryNoticeId}, #{entry.deliveryNoticeNo}, #{entry.FMaterialID}, #{entry.FMaterialName}, #{entry.FMateriaModel}, #{entry.FMateriaType}, #{entry.FUnitID}, #{entry.FQty}, #{entry.FStockID}, #{entry.FNoteEntry}, #{entry.FBaseUnitID}, #{entry.FBaseUnitQty}, #{entry.FDeliveryLoc}, #{entry.FDeliveryLAddress}, #{entry.FOrderNo}, #{entry.FOrderSeq}, #{entry.FCustMatID}, #{entry.FLot}, #{entry.FIsFree}, #{entry.FCustMatName}, #{entry.FRemainOutQty}, #{entry.FStockStatusId}, #{entry.FPriceUnitQty}, #{entry.FPrice}, #{entry.FTaxPrice}, #{entry.FTaxCombination}, #{entry.FEntryTaxRate}, #{entry.FPriceCoefficient}, #{entry.FSysPrice}, #{entry.FLimitDownPrice}, #{entry.FBefDisAmt}, #{entry.FBefDisAllAmt}, #{entry.FDiscountRate}, #{entry.F_ora_Decimal}, #{entry.F_ora_Decimal1}, #{entry.F_c}, #{entry.F_k}, #{entry.F_g}, #{entry.F_tj}, #{entry.F_mz}, #{entry.F_jz}, #{entry.F_mzz}, #{entry.F_xs}, #{entry.F_zxs}, #{entry.F_cgzj}, #{entry.F_zjzj}, #{entry.F_kpdj}, #{entry.F_kpzj}, #{entry.F_zwbgpm}, #{entry.F_ywbgpm}, #{entry.F_jzz}, #{entry.F_jcsj}, #{entry.F_khhh}, #{entry.F_sfbg}, #{entry.F_ddhsdj}, #{entry.F_tsl}, #{entry.F_bgdw}, #{entry.F_tcblNEW}, #{entry.F_BCFYNEW}, #{entry.F_GLBCFY}, #{entry.F_ffyq}, #{entry.Fddshrq}, #{entry.Fxsddh}, #{entry.Fxsddhh}, #{entry.Fbzgctg}, #{entry.Fypd}, #{entry.Fykc}, #{entry.F_cty_BaseProperty}, #{entry.Frkshrq}, #{entry.Fckshrq}, #{entry.F_BZFS} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM delivery_notice_entry WHERE delivery_notice_id = #{deliveryNoticeId} and FMaterialID = #{fmaterialId}

SELECT dene.delivery_notice_no, bym.number as FMaterialID, dene.FMaterialName, dene.FMateriaModel, dene.FMateriaType, bymate.name as FUnitID, dene.FQty, bl.name as FStockID, dene.FNoteEntry, bdymate.name as FBaseUnitID, dene.FBaseUnitQty, dene.FDeliveryLoc, dene.FDeliveryLAddress, dene.FOrderNo, dene.FOrderSeq, dene.FCustMatID, dene.FLot, dene.FIsFree, dene.FCustMatName, dene.FRemainOutQty, bdl.name as FStockStatusId, dene.FPriceUnitQty, dene.FPrice, dene.FTaxPrice, dene.FTaxCombination, dene.FEntryTaxRate, dene.FPriceCoefficient, dene.FSysPrice, dene.FLimitDownPrice, dene.FBefDisAmt, dene.FBefDisAllAmt, dene.FDiscountRate, dene.F_ora_Decimal, dene.F_ora_Decimal1, dene.F_c, dene.F_k, dene.F_g, dene.F_tj, dene.F_mz, dene.F_jz, dene.F_mzz, dene.F_xs, dene.F_zxs, dene.F_cgzj, dene.F_zjzj, dene.F_kpdj, dene.F_kpzj, dene.F_zwbgpm, dene.F_ywbgpm, dene.F_jzz, dene.F_jcsj, dene.F_khhh, dene.F_sfbg, dene.F_ddhsdj, dene.F_tsl, dene.F_bgdw, dene.F_tcblNEW, dene.F_BCFYNEW, dene.F_GLBCFY, dene.F_ffyq, dene.Fddshrq, dene.Fxsddh, dene.Fxsddhh, dene.Fbzgctg, dene.Fypd, dene.Fykc, dene.F_cty_BaseProperty, dene.Frkshrq, dene.Fckshrq, dene.F_BZFS, dene.created_by, dene.created_at, dene.updated_at FROM delivery_notice_entry dene LEFT JOIN by_material bym ON dene.FMaterialID = bym.k3_id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bymate ON dene.FUnitID = bymate.kingdee and bymate.category='unit' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdymate ON dene.FBaseUnitID = bdymate.kingdee and bdymate.category='unit' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bl ON dene.FStockID = bl.kingdee and bl.category='warehouse' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdl ON dene.FStockStatusId = bdl.kingdee and bdl.category='inventory_status' WHERE delivery_notice_no = #{deliveryNoticeNo}

SELECT dene.delivery_notice_no, bym.number as FMaterialID, dene.FMaterialName, dene.FMateriaModel, dene.FMateriaType, bymate.name as FUnitID, dene.FQty, bl.name as FStockID, dene.FNoteEntry, bdymate.name as FBaseUnitID, dene.FBaseUnitQty, dene.FDeliveryLoc, dene.FDeliveryLAddress, dene.FOrderNo, dene.FOrderSeq, dene.FCustMatID, dene.FLot, dene.FIsFree, dene.FCustMatName, dene.FRemainOutQty, bdl.name as FStockStatusId, dene.FPriceUnitQty, dene.FPrice, dene.FTaxPrice, dene.FTaxCombination, dene.FEntryTaxRate, dene.FPriceCoefficient, dene.FSysPrice, dene.FLimitDownPrice, dene.FBefDisAmt, dene.FBefDisAllAmt, dene.FDiscountRate, dene.F_ora_Decimal, dene.F_ora_Decimal1, dene.F_c, dene.F_k, dene.F_g, dene.F_tj, dene.F_mz, dene.F_jz, dene.F_mzz, dene.F_xs, dene.F_zxs, dene.F_cgzj, dene.F_zjzj, dene.F_kpdj, dene.F_kpzj, dene.F_zwbgpm, dene.F_ywbgpm, dene.F_jzz, dene.F_jcsj, dene.F_khhh, dene.F_sfbg, dene.F_ddhsdj, dene.F_tsl, dene.F_bgdw, dene.F_tcblNEW, dene.F_BCFYNEW, dene.F_GLBCFY, dene.F_ffyq, dene.Fddshrq, dene.Fxsddh, dene.Fxsddhh, dene.Fbzgctg, dene.Fypd, dene.Fykc, dene.F_cty_BaseProperty, dene.Frkshrq, dene.Fckshrq, dene.F_BZFS, dene.created_by, dene.created_at, dene.updated_at FROM delivery_notice_entry dene LEFT JOIN by_material bym ON dene.FMaterialID = bym.k3_id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bymate ON dene.FUnitID = bymate.kingdee and bymate.category='unit' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdymate ON dene.FBaseUnitID = bdymate.kingdee and bdymate.category='unit' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bl ON dene.FStockID = bl.kingdee and bl.category='warehouse' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bdl ON dene.FStockStatusId = bdl.kingdee and bdl.category='inventory_status' WHERE FMaterialID = #{materialId} LIMIT 1
